ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "audio_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio file */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio file in seconds */,
  "timebin_dur" REAL /* Timebin duration in seconds */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split of the audio file (e.g., train, test, validation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audio file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audio file was last updated */,
  "bird_species" TEXT /* Species of the bird whose song is recorded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the recording was made */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was made */,
  "recording_device" TEXT /* Device used for recording */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the recording */,
  "curator_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the data curator about the recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_split FOREIGN KEY ("split") REFERENCES data_splits ("split_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectrogram_files" (
  "spect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrogram file */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated audio file */,
  "spect_path" TEXT /* File path to the spectrogram image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spectrogram file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spectrogram file was last updated */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Frequency range of the spectrogram */,
  "time_resolution" REAL /* Time resolution of the spectrogram */,
  "frequency_resolution" REAL /* Frequency resolution of the spectrogram */,
  "curator_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the data curator about the spectrogram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectrogram_files_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_files" (
  "annot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation file */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated audio file */,
  "annot_path" TEXT /* File path to the annotation file */,
  "annot_format" TEXT /* Format of the annotation file (e.g., notmat, csv, json) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation file was last updated */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "curator_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the data curator about the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_files_annot_format FOREIGN KEY ("annot_format") REFERENCES annotation_formats ("format_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_files_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data curator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file accessed (e.g., audio, spectrogram, annotation) */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data split */,
  "split_name" TEXT /* Name of the data split (e.g., train, test, validation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data split */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data split */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data split was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data split was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_splits_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation format (e.g., notmat, csv, json) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation format */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_formats_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
